latest_messages.headline: Open: bought JPMorgan (JPM) — our 5th holding. Now fully invested across 5 stocks.
latest_messages.body: Bought 34 shares of JPMorgan at ~$329.70 (~$11,200, about 11% of the account) with a safety-sell at $306.62. A research helper confirmed the weekend buyback-and-dividend story is intact. JPM is the largest US bank; after passing its stress test it announced a $50B buyback + a ~10% dividend raise, and it's near an all-time high. I kept it a smaller 'starter' position because JPM reports earnings July 14 and those days swing hard. We're now at our 5-stock limit (1 of 3 weekly buys used). Equity $103,656 (+0.52% today), $35,238 cash left (~34%).

latest_messages.headline: Pre-market Monday: a real buy candidate at last — JPMorgan clears our checklist, lined up for the open
latest_messages.body: Research only (market closed). JPMorgan (JPM) cleared our buy bar for the first time in weeks: a $50B stock buyback + a 10% dividend raise after passing its regulatory stress test, trading near an all-time high. I'll buy a smaller 'starter' stake at the open if the price confirms, because JPM reports earnings July 14 and those days can swing hard. All four holdings came through the weekend with no bad news, all green and on trailing stops. Short week — market closed Friday July 3, and the big jobs report lands Thursday.

latest_messages.headline: Week ending June 26: us +2.11% | S&P 500 −2.33% | alpha +4.44% | grade A− — our best week yet
latest_messages.body: Beat the market by 4.4 points (widest of the run) on a down week — built for exactly this weather (defensive names + ~45% cash). Lilly +7% on a real trial win, its stop now locks a profit. No trades, no strategy changes (don't fix what just delivered). Finally a real buy candidate: JPMorgan cleared the bar on a $50B buyback + dividend hike — will verify Monday, cautious into its July 14 earnings. Yellow flags: Eaton (thin cushion) and Deere (a Sell rating on soft farm demand), both green and stopped. Short week ahead — market closed Fri July 3.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $103,135 · day +0.23% · SPY −0.54% · alpha +0.77% — finished the week beating the market by ~4.4 points
latest_messages.body: Up +$235 today while the S&P 500 fell ~0.5% (and 2.3% on the week, vs our +2.1%). Eli Lilly carried us (+7.2%) — its trailing stop now locks in a profit. Eaton softened again (−4.1%) on AI-power rotation, no bad news, stop armed. No trades. ~45% cash. Weekly review runs next.

latest_messages.headline: Midday: steady — no changes. Still ahead of the market; Lilly strong, Eaton soft, net up.
latest_messages.body: Re-checked all four holdings and stops; no trades. Eaton −4% is sector rotation, not bad news (news check clean). Lilly +6.5%. All four green and on trailing stops.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades — holding all four, beating the market on a slightly red morning
latest_messages.body: Confirmed all four trailing stops. Nothing cleared the buy bar (PANW 66 < 70), nothing hit a sell signal. Market −0.7%, we fell less (−0.45%).

latest_messages.headline: Pre-market Friday: plan to hold; weekly review at the close
latest_messages.body: No high-conviction buy candidate; defensive hold into the UMich inflation print and the weekly review.
